Part: Current Work - Software.

Chapter: Software Requirements.
Current document status: Needs Finance Review.

Section: Software Requirements.

KBC should define requirements before selecting ChurchTrac, IconCMO, QuickBooks, or another system. Software should support the financial structure KBC chooses; it should not be used as a substitute for clear governance.

Section: Must Have.

Table summary.
Requirement: Contribution tracking. Description: Record gifts by donor, fund, date, and giving method.. Notes: Must protect donor confidentiality..
Requirement: Year-end giving statements. Description: Produce accurate annual giving statements.. Notes: Confirm format and correction process..
Requirement: Fund accounting. Description: Track general, designated, restricted, and ministry funds appropriately.. Notes: Needs Finance Committee review..
Requirement: Budget reporting. Description: Show budget-to-actual reports by category or ministry.. Notes: Must support monthly review..
Requirement: Expense tracking. Description: Record bills, reimbursements, card transactions, and other expenses.. Notes: Must preserve documentation..
Requirement: Receipt attachment or documentation link. Description: Attach receipts if available, or clearly link transactions to supporting files.. Notes: Vendor confirmation needed..
Requirement: Bank reconciliation. Description: Support monthly reconciliation or provide clean reconciliation workflow.. Notes: Required for monthly close..
Requirement: User permissions. Description: Assign appropriate access by role.. Notes: Treasurer, Bookkeeper, Finance Committee, Pastor, and staff access may differ..
Requirement: Monthly reports. Description: Produce reports useful for Treasurer and Finance Committee review.. Notes: Define exact packet..
Requirement: Payroll handling or integration. Description: Either process payroll or integrate/support payroll recordkeeping.. Notes: Needs professional review..
Requirement: Audit/review support. Description: Provide exports, reports, and audit trail.. Notes: Important for accountability..
Requirement: Data export. Description: Export financial and contribution records in usable formats.. Notes: Avoid lock-in where possible..

Section: Should Have.

Table summary.
Requirement: Approval workflow. Description: Support reimbursement or spending review steps.. Notes: If unavailable, process can be handled outside software..
Requirement: Credit card transaction import. Description: Import or match card transactions.. Notes: Helpful for monthly review..
Requirement: Bank feed. Description: Import bank activity.. Notes: Must be reviewed for controls and access..
Requirement: Role-specific dashboards. Description: Provide simple views for Treasurer, Bookkeeper, or committee.. Notes: Nice to have..
Requirement: Document storage. Description: Store receipts, invoices, and supporting records.. Notes: Confirm storage limits and privacy..
Requirement: Migration tools. Description: Import donors, accounts, funds, balances, or vendors.. Notes: Needed if moving from existing systems..
Requirement: Training and support. Description: Provide understandable help for volunteers or small church staff.. Notes: Important for sustainability..

Section: Questions For Vendors.

Can the system handle both contributions and accounting in one place?
Can it track restricted/designated funds cleanly?
Can it produce the exact reports KBC needs monthly?
Can users have different permission levels?
Can receipts be attached to transactions?
Can it import bank or credit card transactions?
How are corrections and audit trails handled?
What data can be exported if KBC changes systems later?
How are year-end giving statements produced and corrected?
How does payroll work, or what payroll systems does it integrate with?
What support is available during setup and migration?
What is the total annual cost, including add-ons?

Needs Finance Review: Requirements should be approved by the Finance Committee before demos or final selection.

End of chapter: Software Requirements.
